rules: NO PURPLE/AI-SLOP gradients. Stick to solid blocks of color with subtle noise textures.
High contrast is non-negotiable. Deep navy (#0A192F) must be used for text to ensure visibility.
Use Accent color (Terracotta/Signal Red) strictly for warnings, active states, or critical pressure drops.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' - Classic Serif Headings + Sterile Mono Body

sizing.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium

rules: Headings must use the Serif font, imparting a premium, editorial feel.
All weather data (wind speeds, pressure, coordinates) MUST use the Monospace font for tabular clarity.
Never center-align paragraphs. Use optical alignment and generous left-padding for blocks of text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use 2x normal spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12, py-24)

rules: Dashboard widgets must span varying columns (e.g., Main Map: col-span-full md:col-span-4, Wind Card: col-span-2, Stats: col-span-2).
Never fill 100% of the screen with a single element. Keep breathing room.
Use align-items: start to prevent default stretching unless explicitly needed.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Flat solid backgrounds (#FFFFFF) on #F9F9F6 body, with sharp 1px borders (border-border), no soft drop shadows.
surface_strategies.header_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border.
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Light tint (bg-white/30) over the hero image, text must remain high contrast.
surface_strategies.texture: Add a global SVG noise overlay (opacity-5) to kill digital flatness and give a raw, outdoor feel.

hero.description: Kinetic typography hero. Line-by-line staggered reveal of the headline (e.g., 'Previsão Exata.', 'Pesca Segura.'). Minimalist layout over a highly curated maritime background.

navigation_search.description: Sticky glass header with a sophisticated location search bar. Must include quick preset buttons: 'Mar Aberto', 'Litoral SP', 'Bacia Amazônica', 'Barragens SP'.

windy_map.description: Embedded Windy iframe (https://embed.windy.com) inside a responsive Bento card. Must allow interaction.

weather_widgets.priority_1: Wind (Direction & Speed in km/h) - visual compass indicator.
weather_widgets.priority_2: Atmospheric Pressure - large mono number with trend arrow (up/down).
weather_widgets.others: Waves height/period, Tides table, Water Temp, Solunar best times, Moon phases, Rain probability.

manifesto_chapters.description: Editorial numbered section (e.g., '01 / O Vento', '02 / A Maré') detailing the importance of reading the weather for fishing.

marquee.description: Slow, elegant scrolling text using the Serif font: 'PREVISÃO MARÍTIMA E FLUVIAL — DADOS EM TEMPO REAL — NAUTITUDE & WINDY'.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: MANDATORY: Use '@studio-freight/lenis' for buttery smooth momentum scrolling. This is critical for the premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.animations: framer-motion for stagger-children on the bento grid cards (fade up, slow ease).
motion_and_interactions.microinteractions: Hover states on preset buttons should feature a subtle background fill and text color change. Cards should not have bouncy scale animations; keep it rigid and technical.

hero_background.description: Fisherman with boat on the shoreline during dawn. Used as the main landing page kinetic hero background.

amazon_preset_visual.description: Aerial view of a boat on the muddy Amazon river.
amazon_preset_visual.placement: Manifesto / Editorial imagery for river fishing context

nautical_texture.placement: Decorative element in the Dashboard or Manifesto section

setup: Add custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, IBM Plex Mono) via Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS.
Configure Tailwind colors based on the palette above.
execution_steps: 1. Setup Lenis wrapper in App.js for smooth scrolling.
2. Build the Crystal Glass Header with location search and preset pills.
3. Build the Kinetic Hero section with Framer Motion staggered text reveal.
4. Develop the Dashboard section (Bento Grid): incorporate Windy iframe map, and mock the weather data components (Wind compass, Pressure, Tides, Solunar) using Shadcn-like flat cards.
5. Implement the Editorial Chapter section and the slow Marquee.
6. Add a subtle global noise texture overlay using CSS or a base64 SVG pattern.
instructions_to_main_agent.language: All UI copy MUST be in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR).

universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='search-input', data-testid='wind-card').
universal_guidelines.anti_slop: Do not center align paragraphs. Do not use generic borders or box-shadows. Stick to flat, sharp, high-contrast aesthetics.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios for text on images. Use overlays where necessary to protect text legibility.
universal_guidelines.components: Use custom raw HTML/Tailwind for the landing page hero and manifesto for maximum creative freedom. Use strict grid rules for the weather dashboard cards.
